title: koeleria cristata eriostachya
intro: Koeleria cristata eriostachya, also known as June grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata eriostachya include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Koeleria cristata eriostachya is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations may also involve drying and grinding the plant material into a powder for later use.
